message:
fix(network): remove redundant --dhcp-leasefile argument

dnsmasq requires --dhcp-leasefile=<path> format (with =), not
--dhcp-leasefile <path>. Since the lease path is already in the
config file, we can simply remove the redundant command line argument.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
